item.title:
两个鬼在聊天，一个说："现在投胎好难，出生率降低了，当人的机会太少了。"
另一个说："乐观点，现在马上就 AGI 了。到时候不用投胎碳基生命，直接投胎到硅基生命。跨过人...

item.title: Impressive. But how do use robotics? For industry and healthcare or soon to be on to be on the war f...
item.author: @DeepLearn007

item.title:
AI automates tasks, not jobs, and when a task gets cheaper, demand for the job grows.
AI cannot au...
item.description:
AI automates tasks, not jobs, and when a task gets cheaper, demand for the job grows.
AI cannot automate jobs end-to-end because it lacks autonomy and cannot operate without supervision. There is still zero job from 2022 that can be performed end-to-end by AI, not even translator or customer support associate.
--- @fchollet | ❤️ 30 | 🔁 9 | 💬 9 | 👁 2697
item.author: @fchollet

item.title: i havent done the work to compare it to peers but i'm just excited that we have a base model and hon...
item.description:
i havent done the work to compare it to peers but i'm just excited that we have a base model and honestly for all the people that complained about the death of the completions API (@deepfates ? or deepfates adjacent) not enough people are experimenting with weird usages and finetunes of the base models we DO get
https://t.co/TDXdKTFC74
--- @swyx | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 2 | 👁 441
item.author: @swyx
